'''''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume'' 5''' is the fifth volume in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'' graphic novels]] series.

==Publisher's summary==
''Strap in for another tour through the highly charged Clone Wars Adventures!''

''As the fires of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] burn across the galaxy, heroes on both sides of the conflict emerge, and no matter what the outcome, the galaxy will be forever changed. Presenting four more pulse-racing tales of knock-down, drag-out action and adventure, all told in the same stripped-down stylization as Cartoon Network's [[Star Wars: Clone Wars|micro-series]]''.

==Contents==
*"[[What Goes Up... (comic story)|What Goes Up...]]"
*"[[Bailed Out]]"
*"[[Heroes on Both Sides (comic story)|Heroes on Both Sides]]"
*"[[The Order of Outcasts]]"
